privileged_info_summary: The task 'incoming_inspection_protocol@1' is a very_hard Odoo 17 quality control task with verified metadata: version 1.0, environment odoo_quality_env@0.1, 1200-second timeout, 150 max steps, sparse reward type with 70/100 pass threshold. The task runs on Odoo 17 at localhost:8069 with admin/admin credentials. All three required products exist: Cabinet with Doors, Acoustic Bloc Screens, and Office Chair. Both quality checks (Visual Inspection - Cabinet Finish, Dimension Verification - Screen Width) exist. Standards referenced are real: ISO 9001:2015 Clause 8.5.1 (control of production/service provision), ASTM E90 (airborne sound transmission loss), BIFMA X5.1-2017 (office chair ergonomic standard). The task requires creating 3 quality control points and updating 2 existing checks. Data is entirely synthetic, created by Odoo RPC setup scripts (18 quality alerts, 6 checks, 5 products). DISCREPANCY: Task description claims quality checks are 'in To Do state' but actual setup creates them in 'none' state (setup_data.py, setup_task.sh line 61).
